focus_areas.detail: S01 correctly imports and calls globs_intersect from orch.daemon.scope_overlap. Both Phase 3 (intra-batch) and Phase 3b (cross-batch) loops use it. Zero reimplementation of overlap logic inline. git diff confirms zero remaining & set( overlap computations in orch/batch_planner.py.

S05 already performed the grep. No duplicate set & set overlap implementations found in orch/, dashboard/, executor/, or tests/. The single canonical implementation is globs_intersect in orch/daemon/scope_overlap.py, shared by both planner and daemon. No follow-up Incident needed.

Zero , 4) literals remaining in production call sites. dashboard/routers/actions.py:894-896 and orch/cli/batch_commands.py:221-223 both use batch.max_parallel. Pre-existing test fixtures in tests/unit/test_batch_planner_analysis.py (lines 220, 237, 254) use literal 4 as structural test constants — not a live bug, but code hygiene improvement warranted. S03's test_execution_plan_md_renders_given_max_parallel covers value-variation correctly. One MEDIUM follow-up filed (FU-I-00104-001).

S03's tdd_red_evidence is genuine and precisely targeted. test_glob_vs_concrete_file_overlap and test_dir_glob_vs_dir_glob_overlap target Phase 3's set & set branch. test_cross_batch_overlap_uses_globs_intersect targets the cross-batch loop's set & active_files branch. test_execution_plan_md_renders_given_max_parallel is correctly classified as GREEN regression-lock (helper was always correct; caller was the bug). test_strictly_disjoint_paths_no_overlap is a negative case (not RED-able). No boilerplate.

S06 had 3 fix cycles for pre-existing lint errors in tests/e2e/test_journey_htmx_fragments.py (N806, T201 — out-of-scope to I-00104). S09 had 5 fix cycles for pre-existing test TestI00105EffectiveContextPct returning None == 0.0 (unrelated to I-00104). S12 had 1 productive fix cycle (E2E DB vs. orch DB mismatch — led to fixture seeding). No cycles caused by misread of globs_intersect return type or argument shape.

follow_ups.title: Update pre-existing test fixtures to use named max_parallel parameter
follow_ups.description: tests/unit/test_batch_planner_analysis.py lines 220, 237, 254 pass literal 4 to generate_execution_plan_md / generate_drawio / generate_png as structural test constants. While not a live bug, using named parameter max_parallel=4 would improve consistency with test_batch_planner_overlap.py::test_execution_plan_md_renders_given_max_parallel and avoid future ambiguity.

follow_ups.title: Add docstring example to globs_intersect return value
follow_ups.description: globs_intersect returns list[str] (matching globs from the first argument), not bool. Adding a concrete example in the docstring (e.g. 'globs_intersect(["a/**"], ["a/b/c.py"]) -> ["a/**"]') would prevent future agents from misinterpreting the return type and accidentally writing 'if globs_intersect(...):' instead of 'if globs_intersect(...):' which works but 'overlap = globs_intersect(...); if overlap:' which is more explicit.

notes: iw-item-analyze skill not registered as CLI command in this worktree. Analysis performed by direct source reading. Browser verification (S12) confirmed all acceptance criteria end-to-end. All fix cycles were out-of-scope pre-existing issues or productive (fixture seeding). Implementation quality is high.
